title: No grief endermen
description: Endermen no longer pick up blocks, but they can still be agro'd
body:
# No Grief Endermen
Endermen no longer pick up blocks, but they can still be agro'd. This mod works on single player as well as multiplayer servers, if the server runs fabric. If on a server, the player does not need to have this mod installed.

![showcase](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/quervyloll/Anti-Enderman/refs/heads/main/src/main/image.png)
## Installation
- Install [fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) & the [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- Move the mod jar and the [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) jar to your minecraft mods folder
- You have now prevented endermen from griefing!

### Contact
